para_trans: The total amount for Poladpur Nagar Panchayat, District Raigad under Account Head (2217 1301) is Rs. 11.00 Crores (purse)
Government Correctional Certificate No: - NABARD-2026 / Q.No.85 (2) / NAB-16 (E-1632787)
1) Government Decision No: - NABARD-2026 / Q. No.85 (2) / NAB-16 (E-1632787) / NAB-16
Municipal councils in the state are given special grants for specialized work. under reference
In the Government Decision Statement at No. (1) (Amount Rs. 11.00 crores) for works
Withdrawal of the said works subject to the condition that no commencement order has been issued and in lieu thereof.
The works in the attached returns are being approved by the said Government through a certificate.
2. Reference No. (1) All other terms and conditions contained in the Government Decision herein shall apply.
3. This Government Decision is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
